heroHeadline: 'I Thought I Might Die': Palestinian Mother Recounts Israeli Detention
heroSubtitle: A Palestinian mother gave a firsthand account of her detention by Israeli forces in the West Bank, describing fear for her life and conditions in Israeli custody, adding to documentation of detention practices.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
